Bash(python3 scripts/mcp-client.py call -u http://localhost:8808 -t browser_evaluate -p "{\\"function\\": \\"\(\) => { const logo = document.querySelector\('img[src*=logo], .logo img, header img, .site-logo img, img[alt*=logo i], img[alt*=assignment i]'\); const btn = document.querySelector\('a.order-btn, .btn-primary, header a[href*=order], nav a[href*=order], .order-now-btn'\); const btnStyle = btn ? window.getComputedStyle\(btn\) : null; return { logoSrc: logo ? logo.src : null, logoAlt: logo ? logo.alt : null, btnBg: btnStyle ? btnStyle.backgroundColor : null, btnColor: btnStyle ? btnStyle.color : null, headerBg: window.getComputedStyle\(document.querySelector\('header, .site-header, nav, .navbar'\)\).backgroundColor }; }\\"}")

Bash(python3 scripts/mcp-client.py call -u http://localhost:8808 -t browser_evaluate -p "{\\"function\\": \\"\(\) => { const headerEl = document.querySelector\('header, .site-header, #masthead'\); const navEl = document.querySelector\('nav, .navbar, .main-nav'\); const allLinks = Array.from\(document.querySelectorAll\('a'\)\).slice\(0, 30\).map\(a => \({ text: a.textContent.trim\(\).slice\(0,20\), color: window.getComputedStyle\(a\).color, bg: window.getComputedStyle\(a\).backgroundColor }\)\).filter\(l => l.bg !== 'rgba\(0, 0, 0, 0\)' && l.bg !== 'transparent'\); const logoImg = document.querySelector\('img[alt*=assignment i]'\); return { headerBgComputed: headerEl ? window.getComputedStyle\(headerEl\).backgroundColor : null, navBg: navEl ? window.getComputedStyle\(navEl\).backgroundColor : null, coloredLinks: allLinks.slice\(0,5\), logoSrc: logoImg ? logoImg.src : null }; }\\"}")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\(d.get\('result'\), d.get\('tests'\), 'tests', d.get\('passed'\), 'pass', d.get\('failed',0\), 'fail'\); [print\('FAIL:', f['test'][:80], '\\n  ', f['message'][:100]\) for f in d.get\('failures',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k not in ['failures','errors','warnings']}, indent=2\)\); errs=d.get\('errors',[]\); [print\('ERROR:', e['test'][:80], '\\n  ', e.get\('message',''\)[:150]\) for e in errs]")
